ticket.subject: Question about downgrading from Enterprise to Business plan — billing timeline
ticket.body: We're looking to downgrade our Enterprise subscription to the Business plan. We're currently 8 days into our monthly billing cycle. Will you credit us for the unused Enterprise days, or do we lose those charges when we switch? Also, I need to understand when the downgrade becomes active — do we lose Enterprise features like advanced reporting immediately, or do we keep access through the end of the current billing period?
